hero.subtitle: Calendar, tasks, habits, and goals all in one app.

howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to organize your time

step1.title: Create your calendars
step1.description: Organize your events by calendar: work, personal, sport. External sync coming soon.

step2.title: Plan your tasks
step2.description: Create tasks, set goals, and use Focus mode to stay concentrated.

step3.title: Track your progress
step3.description: View your completed tasks, track your habits, and celebrate your achievements.

timeTracking.title: Visualize your schedule
timeTracking.description: Organize your events by category and visualize how you allocate your time.

focusMode.title: Stay focused
focusMode.description: Focus mode helps you work on one task at a time with the built-in Pomodoro timer.

multiCalendar.title: Organize your calendars
multiCalendar.description: Create and manage multiple calendars in one place: work, personal, sport...

customViews.title: Customize your view
customViews.description: Choose the view that works best for you: day, week, or month. Click on a day to see details.

goals.title: Set your goals
goals.description: Create goals and break them down into steps. Track your progress visually.

goals.title: Current goal
goals.clickToToggle: Click on a phase to check/uncheck it

personas.subtitle: Whether you're a student, entrepreneur, or freelancer, DPM Calendar adapts to your lifestyle.

students.title: Students
students.description: Manage your classes, exams, and projects. Never miss a deadline again.

entrepreneurs.title: Entrepreneurs
entrepreneurs.description: Grow your business while staying in control of your schedule.

freelancers.title: Freelancers
freelancers.description: Juggle multiple clients and projects without losing track.

security.subtitle: We take data security very seriously. Your privacy is our priority.

encryption.title: Encrypted transport (TLS 1.3)
encryption.description: All connections to the service go through HTTPS/TLS 1.3 via Vercel Edge Network.

hosting.title: Modern infrastructure
hosting.description: Hosted on Vercel (global edge network) with a managed PostgreSQL database on Supabase.

auth.title: OAuth 2.0 authentication
auth.description: Sign in with Google or Microsoft — no passwords stored by DPM Calendar.

cta.subtitle: Try DPM Calendar and organize your productivity.
cta.noCreditCard: Free during Early Access — No credit card required

home.alreadyCompleted: Great! You've already completed {count} task(s). Keep it up!
home.startImportant: Start with your most important task. Once done, the rest will be easier!

intro.p1: DPM Inc. ("we", "us", or "our") operates DPM Calendar, a productivity application that helps you manage your calendar, tasks, habits, and goals. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our service.
intro.p2: Please read this privacy policy carefully. By using DPM Calendar, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.

dataCollected.title: 2. Information We Collect
dataCollected.intro: We collect information that you provide directly to us and information that is automatically collected when you use our service.

account.title: Account Information
account.name: Full name
account.provider: Authentication provider (Google, Microsoft, GitHub, or Apple)

purpose.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
purpose.service: To provide, maintain, and improve the DPM Calendar service
purpose.sync: To synchronize your data with connected calendar services
purpose.improve: To analyze usage patterns and improve our features
purpose.support: To respond to your comments, questions, and support requests
purpose.security: To detect, prevent, and address technical issues and security threats

consent.title: Consent
consent.desc: You have given consent to the processing of your personal data for one or more specific purposes

contract.title: Contract
contract.desc: Processing is necessary for the performance of a contract to which you are a party

legitimate.title: Legitimate interests
legitimate.desc: Processing is necessary for the purposes of legitimate interests pursued by us

legal.title: Legal obligation
legal.desc: Processing is necessary for compliance with a legal obligation

storage.title: 5. Data Storage and Location
storage.intro: Your data is stored securely using industry-standard practices:

database.title: Database
database.desc: Supabase (PostgreSQL) - a managed database service with encryption at rest

hosting.title: Application Hosting
hosting.desc: Vercel - a global edge network with automatic SSL/TLS encryption

location.title: Data Location
location.desc: Our primary data centers are located in the United States. By using our service, you consent to the transfer of your data to the US.

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.active: Account data is retained as long as your account is active
retention.deletion: Upon account deletion, your data is removed within 30 days
retention.backup: Backup copies may be retained for up to 90 days for disaster recovery
retention.legal: Some data may be retained longer if required by law

sharing.title: 7. Data Sharing
sharing.intro: We share your data only with the following service providers who are necessary for the operation of our service:
sharing.oauth: Authentication providers (Google, Microsoft, GitHub, Apple) for sign-in only
sharing.noSale: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.intro: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience:

essential.title: Essential cookies
essential.desc: Required for authentication and basic functionality

analytics.title: Analytics (Vercel Analytics)
analytics.desc: Anonymous usage data to improve our service. You can opt out in your browser settings.

rights.title: 9. Your Rights
rights.intro: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:

access.title: Right of access
access.desc: Request a copy of your personal data

deletion.title: Right of deletion
deletion.desc: Request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten")

portability.title: Right of portability
portability.desc: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format

restriction.title: Right of restriction
restriction.desc: Request restriction of processing in certain circumstances

objection.title: Right of objection
objection.desc: Object to processing based on legitimate interests

withdrawal.title: Right to withdraw consent
withdrawal.desc: Withdraw your consent at any time

rights.exercise: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at privacy@dpmcalendar.com. We will respond within 30 days.

compliance.title: 10. Regulatory Compliance
compliance.intro: We are committed to complying with applicable data protection laws:

loi25.title: Law 25 (Quebec)
loi25.desc: Quebec's Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector

pipeda.title: PIPEDA (Canada)
pipeda.desc: Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act

gdpr.title: GDPR (European Union)
gdpr.desc: General Data Protection Regulation for EU users

security.title: 11. Security Measures
security.intro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data:
security.tls: All data in transit is encrypted using TLS 1.3
security.oauth: OAuth 2.0 authentication - we never store your passwords
security.access: Access controls and authentication for all systems
security.monitoring: Regular security monitoring and vulnerability assessments

children.title: 12. Children's Privacy
children.desc: DPM Calendar is not intended for users under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.

changes.title: 13. Changes to This Policy
changes.desc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.

contact.title: 14. Contact Us
contact.desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:

intro.p1: Welcome to DPM Calendar! These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the DPM Calendar application and services operated by DPM Inc. ("we", "us", or "our").
intro.p2: By accessing or using DPM Calendar, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of these Terms, you may not access the service.

service.desc: The DPM Calendar web application and all related services

user.desc: Any individual who accesses or uses the Service

account.desc: A registered user profile on the Service

content.desc: Any data, text, or information you create, upload, or store on the Service

serviceDesc.title: 2. Service Description
serviceDesc.intro: DPM Calendar is a productivity application that provides:

creation.title: Account Creation
creation.desc: To use DPM Calendar, you must create an account using one of our supported authentication providers (Google, Microsoft, GitHub, or Apple). By creating an account, you represent that you are at least 13 years old.

responsibilities.title: Account Responsibilities
responsibilities.secure: Maintain the security of your authentication credentials
responsibilities.notify: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access
responsibilities.activity: Accept responsibility for all activities under your account

age.title: Age Requirement
age.desc: You must be at least 13 years old to use DPM Calendar. If you are under 18, you must have permission from a parent or legal guardian.

acceptableUse.title: 4. Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.intro: You agree to use DPM Calendar only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Activities
prohibited.illegal: Use the Service for any illegal purpose or in violation of any laws
prohibited.harmful: Upload harmful content including viruses, malware, or malicious code
prohibited.infringe: Infringe on the intellectual property rights of others
prohibited.interfere: Interfere with or disrupt the Service or servers
prohibited.reverse: Attempt to reverse engineer, decompile, or hack the Service
prohibited.automated: Use automated means to access the Service without permission

userContent.title: 5. User Content
userContent.ownership: You retain ownership of all content you create or upload to DPM Calendar. Your events, tasks, habits, goals, and other data remain yours.
userContent.license: By using the Service, you grant us a limited license to store, process, and display your content solely for the purpose of providing the Service to you.
userContent.responsibility: You are solely responsible for your content and must ensure it does not violate any laws or third-party rights.

ip.title: 6. Intellectual Property
ip.ownership: DPM Calendar, including its original content, features, and functionality, is owned by DPM Inc. and is protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
ip.license: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use the Service for your personal, non-commercial use.
ip.restrictions: You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, or lease any part of our Service or its content, nor may you reverse engineer or attempt to extract the source code.

thirdParty.title: 7. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.intro: DPM Calendar integrates with third-party services including:
thirdParty.terms: Your use of these services is subject to their respective terms of service and privacy policies. We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or availability of third-party services.

availability.title: 8. Service Availability
availability.asIs: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.
availability.maintenance: We may suspend or discontinue the Service at any time for maintenance, updates, or other reasons. We will make reasonable efforts to notify you in advance of any planned downtime.

liability.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
liability.disclaimer: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, DPM Inc. shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses.
liability.limitation: Our total liability for any claims arising from or relating to the Service shall not exceed the amount you paid us, if any, in the twelve (12) months prior to the claim.
liability.exclusions: Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion of certain warranties or limitation of liability, so some of the above limitations may not apply to you.

indemnification.title: 10. Indemnification
indemnification.desc: You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless DPM Inc. and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any claims, damages, obligations, losses, liabilities, costs, or debt arising from your use of the Service or violation of these Terms.

byUser.title: Termination by You
byUser.desc: You may terminate your account at any time by deleting your account through the settings page or by contacting us. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease.

byUs.title: Termination by Us
byUs.desc: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including without limitation if you breach these Terms.

effects.title: Effects of Termination
effects.desc: Upon termination, your data will be deleted in accordance with our Privacy Policy. Some provisions of these Terms shall survive termination, including ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, and limitations of liability.

changes.title: 12. Changes to Terms
changes.desc: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will provide at least 30 days' notice before any new terms take effect. By continuing to access or use our Service after those revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms.

law.title: 13. Governing Law
law.jurisdiction: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Province of Quebec and the federal laws of Canada applicable therein, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
law.disputes: Any dispute arising from or relating to these Terms or the Service shall be resolved exclusively in the courts of Quebec, Canada. You consent to the personal jurisdiction of such courts.

severability.title: 14. Severability
severability.desc: If any provision of these Terms is held to be unenforceable or invalid, such provision will be changed and interpreted to accomplish the objectives of such provision to the greatest extent possible under applicable law, and the remaining provisions will continue in full force and effect.

contact.title: 15. Contact Us
contact.desc: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:

welcome.title: Welcome to DPM Calendar!
welcome.subtitle: Let's get you set up in under 2 minutes
welcome.connectCalendar: Connect your calendar to get started
welcome.calendarNote: Your calendar data stays private and secure

tasks.title: What's on your mind?
tasks.subtitle: Add a few tasks you want to accomplish
tasks.tip: Tip: Start with your most important tasks

energy.title: How's your energy?
energy.subtitle: This helps us schedule tasks at the right time
energy.tip: Tip: Be honest - we'll match tasks to your energy

plan.title: Your Smart Plan
plan.subtitle: Here's how we'd schedule your tasks
plan.noTasks: Add some tasks to see your smart plan
plan.tip: Tip: You can always adjust this in the dashboard

complete.success: Welcome aboard! Let's make today productive.

errors.complete: Something went wrong. Please try again.

wish.title: What do you wish to achieve?
wish.subtitle: Start with your most important goal for today
wish.placeholder: e.g., Complete the project proposal and send it to the client
wish.tip: Be specific and realistic - what would make today a success?

outcome.title: Imagine the best outcome
outcome.subtitle: What happens when you achieve this?
outcome.placeholder: e.g., I'll feel accomplished, the client will be impressed, and I'll be one step closer to the promotion
outcome.tip: Visualize the positive feelings and consequences of success

obstacle.title: What could get in your way?
obstacle.subtitle: Identify your main inner obstacle
obstacle.placeholder: e.g., I might get distracted by emails and lose focus, or feel overwhelmed by the scope
obstacle.tip: Be honest - what typically prevents you from achieving your goals?

plan.title: Create your If-Then plan
plan.subtitle: Prepare for when the obstacle appears
plan.ifPlaceholder: e.g., I feel the urge to check emails during focused work time
plan.thenPlaceholder: e.g., I will take 3 deep breaths, remind myself why this matters, and work for just 10 more minutes
plan.tip: This pre-planned response helps you overcome obstacles automatically

complete.success: Your morning intention is set! You're ready to make today count.

errors.save: Failed to save your intention. Please try again.

notificationSettings.title: Notifications
notificationSettings.description: Control how and when you receive notifications

push.title: Push Notifications
push.description: Get instant notifications on this device
push.notSupported: Push notifications are not supported on this browser
push.permissionDenied: Notification permission was denied. Please enable it in your browser settings.

email.title: Email Notifications
email.description: Receive daily summaries and important reminders via email

devices.title: Connected Device
devices.current: This device is receiving push notifications

notificationSettings.permissionDenied: Please allow notifications in your browser settings

quiz.title: Discover Your Chronotype
quiz.description: Answer 12 quick questions so we can match your focus blocks to your natural energy peaks.

questions.q1_wakeEasily: I wake up easily before 7 AM without an alarm.
questions.q2_morningAlert: I feel mentally sharp within 30 minutes of waking.
questions.q3_earlyExercise: I prefer exercising in the early morning.
questions.q4_breakfastHungry: I am hungry for breakfast shortly after waking.
questions.q5_morningProductive: My best creative work happens before noon.
questions.q6_earlyBed: I feel sleepy by 10 PM on a normal day.
questions.q7_nightEnergy: I get a burst of energy after 8 PM.
questions.q8_lateCreative: My best ideas come to me late at night.
questions.q9_afterDinnerFocus: I can focus deeply after dinner.
questions.q10_sleepInWeekends: On weekends, I naturally sleep past 9 AM.
questions.q11_eveningSocial: I prefer social events held in the evening.
questions.q12_hateMornings: I dread waking up early, even when well rested.

LARK.name: Lark
LARK.description: You peak early. We'll protect your mornings for deep work.

OWL.name: Owl
OWL.description: You peak late. We'll push focus blocks into the afternoon and evening.

THIRD_BIRD.name: Third Bird
THIRD_BIRD.description: You have a broad midday peak — the most common chronotype.

UNKNOWN.name: Unknown
UNKNOWN.description: Take the quiz so we can tailor your schedule.

experiments.title: N-of-1 Experiments
experiments.description: Test hypotheses on yourself. Log a metric, try an intervention, record the result.
experiments.empty: No experiments yet. Start one to see how your tweaks perform.
experiments.hypothesisPlaceholder: e.g. Blocking email until 10 AM improves my morning focus
experiments.interventionValuePrompt: What was the intervention value? (leave blank to skip)

priorityCap.title: Daily priority cap reached
priorityCap.description: You already have {count} priorities today — which should be deferred?
priorityCap.settingsDescription: Maximum number of priority (URGENT/HIGH) tasks per day.

focusPicker.title: Pick a task
focusPicker.description: Choose a task to focus on

morningRitual.title: Morning Ritual
morningRitual.energyPrompt: How are you feeling this morning?
morningRitual.top3Description: Pick up to {cap} priority tasks for today
morningRitual.intentionPrompt: What is your main priority today?

meetingLoad.title: Meeting load (next 7 days)
meetingLoad.highLoadMessage: You have {hours}h of meetings this week (threshold: {threshold}h). Consider declining or rescheduling.
meetingLoad.backToBackHint: Add 30-min buffers to recover between them.
meetingLoad.noBackToBack: No back-to-back meetings detected. Good spacing.

shutdownRoutine.title: Shutdown Routine
shutdownRoutine.tomorrowEmpty: Nothing planned yet. Tomorrow morning will do.
shutdownRoutine.gratitudePrompt: Three things you are grateful for
shutdownRoutine.closeLoopDescription: A few final checks before disconnecting
